backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend that handles user profiles, poetry, dua, and song CRUD operations with admin/user authorization, blob storage integration, maintenance mode, and user management (block/unblock).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—fixing maintenance mode toggle and registered users list in UsersControlsPanel—to their relevant files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key behaviors of components, pages, and hooks in the React application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Dard-e-munasif', linking the favicon, and mounting the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for login, home (Mix), poetry, dua, songs, and admin pages, wrapped in a ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentMan: An admin panel component that lists all poetry, dua, and song content items and allows deletion of each with a confirmation dialog and optimistic UI updates.
frontend/src/components/admin/DuaUploadF: A form component for admins to upload a new dua with title, content, and an optional audio file, showing upload progress via a progress bar.
frontend/src/components/admin/PoetryUplo: A form component for admins to upload a new poetry entry with title, content, and an optional image file, showing upload progress via a progress bar.
frontend/src/components/admin/SongUpload: A form component for admins to upload songs with title, artist, and audio file fields, tracking upload progress and using the createSong mutation to submit data.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersContr: An admin panel component for managing users (block/unblock) and toggling maintenance mode, with search filtering and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx: Reusable audio player component with play/pause, seek slider, AudioContext focus management, MediaSession integration, enforced unmuted full-volume playback, and a permission-denied guard UI.
frontend/src/components/BanScreen.tsx: Full-screen overlay component shown to suspended users, displaying an 'Account Suspended' message and a WhatsApp deep-link button to contact the admin.
frontend/src/components/DuaPost.tsx: Renders a card component for a single Dua post with like, download, copy, and share functionality, plus a full-screen modal on click.
frontend/src/components/FullScreenPostMo: Displays a full-screen modal overlay for a Poetry or Dua post, showing its title, content, optional image, audio player, and like count while tracking history.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: Slide-out hamburger menu panel that shows browsing history and offline downloads, with playback and delete controls for downloaded audio.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout wrapper that handles credential checks, ban/maintenance state, navigation guards, theme toggling, and renders the bottom nav bar.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceScree: Full-screen maintenance notice UI with an animated wrench icon and bouncing dots, displayed when the app is under maintenance.
Full-screen music player modal that auto-plays a song on open, provides play/pause and seek controls, and tracks the song in history.
frontend/src/components/PINAuthGuard.tsx: A PIN-based authentication guard component that wraps admin content, checking sessionStorage for an existing session and prompting for a hardcoded PIN if not authenticated.
frontend/src/components/PoetryPost.tsx: A card component for displaying a poetry post with like, share, copy, and download actions, plus a full-screen modal view and auto-refreshing relative timestamp.
frontend/src/components/SongPost.tsx: A card component for displaying a song post with inline play/pause, like, share, and copy actions, and a now-playing modal triggered on card click.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance using TanStack Query, initializing it with the user's Internet Identity and an optional admin token.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminActor.ts: A React hook that lazily initializes a singleton admin backend actor using a PIN-based token from sessionStorage, with retry logic and loading state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayback.ts: A hook managing global singleton audio playback state, including play/pause/seek controls, wake lock, MediaSession metadata, and audio permission checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloads.ts: A hook for managing offline audio downloads stored in IndexedDB, exposing add, delete, play, and refresh operations with ready-state gating.
frontend/src/hooks/useHistory.ts: A hook for tracking playback history entries in IndexedDB, providing methods to add entries with timestamps and refresh the history list.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating Poetry, Dua, and Song data via backend actors, including like increments and admin create/delete operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebAudioFilters.ts: A stub hook that previously managed Web Audio filter chains but now returns no-ops, as audio playback was simplified to direct HTMLAudioElement usage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with light/dark CSS custom properties, and defines typography utilities for Urdu/Nastaliq and poetry content.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin panel page protected by a PIN guard, providing tabbed UI for uploading Poetry/Dua/Song content, managing existing content, and controlling users.
frontend/src/pages/DuaPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays all Dua entries in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons, error alerts, and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login/registration page that collects a user's name, lets them select a server, generates a device fingerprint, and registers the user via the backend before redirecting to home.
frontend/src/pages/MixPage.tsx: A feed page that combines poetry, dua, and songs into a single filterable list, with a user identity card showing the stored unique code and category tab filters.
frontend/src/pages/PoetryPage.tsx: Displays all poetry posts in a responsive grid with loading skeletons, error alerts with retry, and an empty state message.
frontend/src/pages/SongsPage.tsx: Displays all song posts in a responsive grid with loading skeletons, error handling with retry, and an empty state fallback.
frontend/src/utils/indexedDB.ts: Provides IndexedDB helpers for persisting browsing history (up to 50 entries, sorted by timestamp) and downloaded blobs, with CRUD operations for both stores.
frontend/src/utils/timeAgo.ts: Converts an Internet Computer nanosecond timestamp (bigint) to a human-readable relative time string such as 'Just Now', '3 hours ago', or '2 years ago'.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, OKLCH-based design tokens, custom font families (Inter and Noto Nastaliq Urdu), accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for 'Dard-e-munasif', recording two known issues (broken maintenance mode toggle and registered users not showing) and their corresponding fix feature requests targeting admin actor initialization and authorization.
